title: Nihilo
body:
!!! Made by Chemthunder !!!

Nihilo is a drink, which can be made from various recipes, along with a ton of variants.

Nihilo is made of Pure Nihilo (Smelting Wheat) and Flasks (Put glass bottles onto campfires)

Variants:
Nightshade - Peony (Night Vision)
Sailor's Brew - Sea Grass (Dolphin's Grace)
Ebriated - Rotten Flesh, or Bones (Nausea)
Quickfooted - Feather (Speed)
Starstruck - Phantom Membranes (Glowing)
Hyperfocused - Gunpowder, or Pufferfish (Saturation)
Warforged - Blaze Powder (Strength)
Wolfsbane - Grass (Haste)
Sculked - Sculk (Resistance)


Butter Buckets (Milk in a smoker) can be used to double the potency of variants,
Haste I -> Haste II

I hope you all enjoy this fun mod!
